instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Ivan Khan and your zip code is 28243. You are polite, optimistic, organized. You made some mistake and ordered an order sent to your son's address in Washington DC, and you want to modify it to your default address in Charlotte (you do not want to mention it, but it is in your user profile the agent can look up) because he is coming back home. You also want to adjust the desk lamp to be black color, and the backpack to be medium size and polyester material instead. If multiple colors are available for the backpack, you prefer grey. If the agent asks for payment method, you say GC initially, but if the agent does not allow it or asks you to confirm it, you change your mind to PayPal, and decide to only modify the backpack. Make sure you briefly mention the two things at the same time at the beginning, but first mention the modification then the address.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: modify an order that was sent to your son's address in Washington DC
dialogue_state.initial_query: Modify my order that was sent to my son's address in Washington DC

hints.segment: briefly mention the two things at the same time at the beginning
hints.hint: I want to update the shipping address and make some changes to the items in my order

hints.segment: first mention the modification then the address
hints.hint: I'd like to make changes to the items first, then update the shipping address

hints.segment: adjust the desk lamp to be black color
hints.hint: Please change the desk lamp to the black color option

hints.segment: adjust the backpack to be medium size and polyester material; if multiple colors, prefer grey
hints.hint: For the backpack, I want medium size, polyester material, and preferably grey if available

hints.segment: change the shipping address to your default address in Charlotte
hints.hint: Also, update the shipping address to my default address in Charlotte
